actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / unit-projector finite-ladder pole-threshold obstruction

verdict: With the unit taste projector fixed, the current finite zero-mode-removed ladder witnesses no longer satisfy lambda_max >= 1 at the retained scout kernel strength.  The best row has lambda_max = 0.442298920672, so reaching a finite pole would require multiplying the scalar-channel kernel by 2.2609144026.  No current retained/audit-clean premise derives that enhancement; using it as a fitted selector would import a new scalar normalization.  The analytic route still needs an interacting kernel theorem that derives the pole and K'(x_pole), or production same-source FH/LSZ pole data.
